title: Default-Style Winter Pack
description: A Wintery overhaul to the Default Experience!
body:
![Winter Pack Logo](https://i.imgur.com/5KIkkxB.png)

---

This resource pack gives your world a winter theme, while maintaining the default style. For a version of this pack with a Holiday spin, try my **[Christmas Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-style-christmas-pack)**!

**[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (or Optifine) RECOMMENDED!**

**What's Inside**:
- Snow replaces Grass (blended edges with connected textures!)
- Snow Covered Leaves (connected textures!)
- Icy Details
- Winter-themed GUI

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/I3I410P9Q1)

![Images Line Break](https://i.imgur.com/4UV0z4K.png)
![Campfire](https://i.imgur.com/AsMkCUJ.jpg)
![Bay](https://i.imgur.com/k6zTN0F.jpg)
![House](https://i.imgur.com/9EpuAlN.jpg)
![Cherry Grove](https://i.imgur.com/8uEWUGB.jpg)

![Pairings Line Break](https://i.imgur.com/rGi1bap.png)
Some resource packs and client-side mods that pair nicely with this resource pack!
- [Mod] [Fabric] ❄️ [Soft Weather](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/soft-weather): makes snow (and rain) much nicer to look at.
